completion_summary: Deterministic leakage-aware spectrum PNG contract, metadata-only history catalog, provider-neutral artifact hashes, optional VLM dependency lock, nine focused tests, and a passing non-execution readiness audit completed; no weights, inference, paid calls, site changes, or benchmark claim.
scope: Prepare a deterministic, auditable image-observation contract for future open VLM pilots, including canonical spectrum rendering, artifact hashes, on-demand disclosure boundaries, optional dependencies, and readiness evidence; no model download, training, paid calls, site changes, or inclusion in the v0.4 base matrix.
